keyword.title: Target Keyword *
keyword.description: The Google Maps search keyword to rank-check at every grid point. E.g. 'Dental clinic', 'dentist near me'.

businessName.title: Business Name (display only)
businessName.description: Optional. The business's display name shown on the heatmap. Auto-extracted from googleMapsUrl if not provided.

googleMapsUrl.title: Google Maps URL (easiest — paste from the GMB listing)
googleMapsUrl.description: Paste the full Google Maps URL of the business. All unique IDs (Place ID, CID, hex-pair) are extracted automatically. This is the recommended input — no manual ID lookup needed.

placeId.title: Place ID (ChIJ... format)
placeId.description: Google Place ID in base64url format. Starts with 'ChIJ'. Found in the Google Maps URL path or via the Places API. Provide this OR googleMapsUrl.

cid.title: CID (numeric Customer ID)
cid.description: Google's numeric CID for the business. Found in the ?cid= query param of some Maps URLs, or as the decimal of the second hex value in a hex-pair. E.g. '17559876543210'.

hexId.title: Hex-pair ID (0x...:0x... format)
hexId.description: The hex-pair identifier embedded in the Maps URL data param (e.g. after !1s). Format: '0x3bcb93b3...:0x5e8f1e0d...'. The second part is the CID in hex.

centerLat.title: Center Latitude (optional if googleMapsUrl has coordinates)
centerLat.description: Latitude of the business pin — NOT the map view centre. For maximum accuracy: right-click the business pin in Google Maps → 'What's here?' → copy the exact lat shown. Auto-extracted from googleMapsUrl if not provided, but the URL's /@lat,lng may be off by 200–500m if you zoomed out before copying.

centerLng.title: Center Longitude (optional if googleMapsUrl has coordinates)
centerLng.description: Longitude of the business pin. See centerLat instructions above.

gridSize.title: Grid Size (3 / 5 / 7 / 9)
gridSize.description: N for an N×N grid. Enter 3 (9 pts, hyper-local), 5 (25 pts, neighbourhood), 7 (49 pts, standard), or 9 (81 pts, metro-wide).

gridSpacingMeters.title: Grid Spacing in meters (300 / 500 / 1000 / 2000)
gridSpacingMeters.description: Distance between adjacent grid points. Enter 300 (dense city), 500 (standard/optimal), 1000 (suburb), or 2000 (rural).

maxRankToShow.title: Max Rank to Track
maxRankToShow.description: If the business ranks beyond this position at a grid point, it is recorded as INVISIBLE (rank 8+ zone). Default 20.

language.title: Language
language.description: Google Maps interface language (hl param). Default 'en'.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy Country Code
proxyCountry.description: ISO-3166 country code for residential proxy routing. Defaults to 'IN' (India). Google Maps shows completely different local results per country — this MUST match your target market. Change to 'US' for USA, 'GB' for UK, 'AU' for Australia, etc.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies are mandatory — Google blocks datacenter IPs on Maps searches. Pair with Proxy Country Code above for accurate local results.

saveScreenshots.title: Save Screenshots (verification mode)
saveScreenshots.description: Capture a JPEG screenshot of the Google Maps results page at every grid point. Screenshots are saved to the run's Key-Value Store (Storage tab) — named by point index, row, col and detected rank. Use this to visually verify that the scraper is reading the right results. Adds ~15–25 seconds to total runtime. Leave OFF for regular production scans.
